com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXWireAttributeConstraint

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConstraint, IXPlugin

    public interface IXWireAttributeConstraint
extends IXConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to manage attributes and properties of a wire

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean match(IXWire wire, IXSignal signal, IXHarness harness, IXAttributesResult result)
      Determine if attribute changes should be applied given these objects.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • match

        boolean match(IXWire wire,
              IXSignal signal,
              IXHarness harness,
              IXAttributesResult result)
        Determine if attribute changes should be applied given these objects. If so, returns a map of attribute names (Material, Color, Wire Spec etc) to values to be assigned. When the attribute name doesn't correspond to a known attribute, a warning message will be logged.
        Parameters:
        wire - - that the attributes/properties will be applied to. !!NOTE!! This may be a null value (if it is being called during routing, for example).
        signal - - The signal that the wire is/will be associated with.
        harness - - The harness that the wire is/will be in.
        result - - The resulting attribute/property container that has values to be added to the wire. Set when returning "true" result.
        Returns:
        - boolean - Does the constraint apply to this specific set of objects?
